column1: 订单、配送、退换货和账户访问问题都可以从这里联系支持团队。你可以先尝试在线客服，也可以留下联系方式和问题详情，方便客服按单跟进。
column2: You can contact the support team here for order, shipping, return, exchange, and account access issues. You may try live chat first, or leave your contact details and issue description for follow-up.

column1: 如果你正在申请退换货，请优先从个人中心的订单或退换货区域进入，系统会带上更完整的订单上下文。若暂时找不到对应入口，也可以直接在下方表单里提交资料。
column2: If you are applying for a return or exchange, please enter from the order or returns area in your account first so the system can attach better order context. If you cannot find that entry yet, you can still submit the form below.

column1: 适合处理实时咨询、订单状态、退换货进度和账户登录问题。
column2: Best for real-time questions, order status, return progress, and account login issues.

column1: 提交表单后，客服可以看到你留下的邮箱、电话、订单号和问题描述，便于后续追踪。
column2: After submission, support can see the email, phone number, order number, and issue description you left for later follow-up.

column1: 退换货问题建议附上商品照片、包装照片和物流凭证，能减少处理等待。
column2: For return and exchange issues, product photos, packaging photos, and logistics proof help reduce handling delays.

column1: 如果当前不方便等待在线客服，可以直接提交表单。客服会根据你留下的信息继续跟进。
column2: If live chat is not convenient right now, submit the form directly. Support will follow up based on the information you provide.

column1: 你的留言已经提交成功，我们会尽快通过你留下的联系方式与您沟通。
column2: Your message has been submitted successfully. We will contact you through the details you provided as soon as possible.

column1: 如与订单相关，建议填写
column2: Recommended if the issue is related to an order

column1: 请尽量写清楚问题经过、当前状态、希望的处理方式。
column2: Please describe what happened, the current status, and the resolution you expect.

column1: 建议写明订单号、商品名称、问题发生时间和你已经尝试过的处理动作。
column2: Please include the order number, product name, when the issue occurred, and what you have already tried.

column1: 资料越完整，客服越容易一次定位问题，减少来回确认。
column2: The more complete the information, the easier it is for support to locate the issue without repeated confirmation.

column1: 与订单相关的问题建议提供订单号、商品名称和下单时间。
column2: For order-related issues, please provide the order number, product name, and purchase time.

column1: 如涉及损坏、缺件或物流异常，建议先准备照片、视频或物流凭证。
column2: If the issue involves damage, missing items, or shipping anomalies, prepare photos, videos, or logistics proof first.

column1: 表单提交后会进入后台联系单管理，客服可以继续跟进处理状态。
column2: After submission, the inquiry enters the backend contact management area where support can continue tracking its status.
